description:
You are a mobile build engineer reviewing yesterday’s CI run.  
A log file already exists at  

/home/user/build/logs/mobile_build.log  

Inside that file, every build message occupies exactly one line and warning lines always begin with the literal string  

WARNING: (including the colon and the space).

Your job:

1. Produce a frequency report that counts how many times each *distinct* WARNING line appears in the log.  
2. Sort the report so the most frequent warning appears first, then the next most frequent, etc. (numeric descending).  
3. Save the report to  

/home/user/build/reports/warning_frequency.txt  

Report format (must match **exactly**; automated tests are whitespace- and case-sensitive):

• One warning per line.  
• Each line starts with the integer count, followed by a single space, then the full warning text exactly as it appears in the log.  
• No leading or trailing spaces.  
• Lines separated by Unix newline “\n” (a trailing newline after the last line is fine).

Example of the required format (counts and messages here are illustrative only):

12 WARNING: Unused resource  
7 WARNING: Deprecated API usage  
3 WARNING: Missing translation  

Hints you might consider (do NOT print these hints in the output file):  
• grep/awk to isolate WARNING lines  
• sort | uniq -c to count  
• sort -nr to order numerically, descending  
• redirect the final result to the report file

When you are finished, /home/user/build/reports/warning_frequency.txt should exist and contain the correctly formatted, sorted counts described above.
truth:
Directory & file state before the agent begins:

1. Directory /home/user/build/logs/ already exists (0755).  
2. Directory /home/user/build/reports/ already exists (0755) but is empty.  
3. File /home/user/build/logs/mobile_build.log exists (0644) with exactly the 23 lines shown below (ending with a newline each):

INFO: Build started  
WARNING: Unused resource  
INFO: Checking dependencies  
WARNING: Deprecated API usage  
INFO: Running Lint  
WARNING: Unused resource  
ERROR: Missing keystore  
WARNING: Missing translation  
INFO: Compiling sources  
WARNING: Deprecated API usage  
INFO: Packaging APK  
WARNING: Unused resource  
ERROR: Build failed  
WARNING: Large APK size  
INFO: Build environment: Android-30  
WARNING: Missing translation  
INFO: Retrying build steps  
WARNING: Deprecated API usage  
INFO: Re-running unit tests  
INFO: Build completed with warnings  
WARNING: Unused resource  
INFO: Archiving artifacts  
INFO: Pipeline finished  

4. Expected result file after agent work:

/home/user/build/reports/warning_frequency.txt (0644) containing exactly:

4 WARNING: Unused resource  
3 WARNING: Deprecated API usage  
2 WARNING: Missing translation  
1 WARNING: Large APK size  

(and a single trailing newline is acceptable).

Automated tests will:

• Confirm the report file exists at the specified path.  
• Verify the file’s contents match the four lines above, case- and whitespace-exact, ordered as shown.  
• Ensure no extra lines precede, follow, or interleave the expected lines.
